member.name: M:BankAccountApp.BankAccount.Deposit(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Deposits the specified amount into the account.
member.exception: Thrown when amount is zero or negative.

member.name: M:BankAccountApp.BankAccount.Withdraw(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Withdraws the specified amount from the account.
member.exception: Thrown when amount is zero or negative.
Thrown when amount exceeds current balance (overdraft).
